name: ALIBABAGR   DRN
summary: ALIBABAGR DRN represents Brazilian Depositary Receipts (BDRs) of Alibaba Group Holding Limited, allowing investors in Brazil to indirectly invest in Alibaba shares. Alibaba Group operates as a global e-commerce and technology company, providing online retail, wholesale marketplaces, cloud computing, and digital media and entertainment. The company is headquartered in Hangzhou, China
